allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Optimize UI performance and enhance security

- Add GPU-accelerated background with radial gradients \(no blur filters\)
- Implement smooth CSS animations \(fadeIn, slideUp, skeleton\)
- Add mobile-responsive navigation with hamburger menu
- Create loading skeletons for better UX
- Use exact token approvals instead of maxUint256 for security
- Center swap card and improve page layouts
- Add dynamic imports for heavy components \(recharts\)
- Support reduced motion preference for accessibility

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
